Hi Jordan,

The site looks great so far! Danny Ferro and I reviewed the staging link together
and have a couple of change requests before we go live:

1. The Riverside location page needs an update — Danny confirmed the opening date
   moved from May to June 15th, so the "opening this May" banner needs to change.
2. Could the custom cake order form include a field for allergy/dietary notes? We've
   had a few customers email separately about nut allergies and it'd be easier to
   have it all in one place.
3. Danny also wants his name added to the "Meet the Team" section alongside mine,
   since he's taking the lead on the Riverside location.

Other than that we're really happy with it! Once these are in we should be ready
for the second half of the payment.

Thanks again,
Priya
